title: 祭りはひとりじゃできやしねえ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not wanting Inari One's relationship with her
hometown to sour, I reach out to Chief and
explain her true intentions for running in the
regionals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
He then decides to visit Tracen Academy, where
he scolds Inari One—not for running in the
regionals, but for not standing proud and
challenging the Oi racers directly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
His harsh reprimand works, and a fire is lit within
Inari One, burning away any fears she had about
her upcoming battle for the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One declares she'll be the one to conquer
the summit of the regionals. The
misunderstanding thus cleared up, she decides to
face off directly against the racers of Oi.
